name: Pumpkin Soup with Foxtail Millet Dumplings
source_note: Resources/Recipes/Dinner/Pumpkin Soup with Foxtail Millet Dumplings.md
description: Built for an easy night meal, the recipe focuses on soft textures, digestibility, and controlled portions of whole grains. Pumpkin Soup with Foxtail Millet Dumplings brings a distinct structure, seasoning pattern, and grain-legume balance to the table.
cooking_steps: Heat oil in a soup pot over medium heat. Add onion, garlic, ginger, cumin, and pepper and cook 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the vegetable, pulse or grain accent, salt, and water. Bring to a boil, then reduce to low heat and simmer 18 minutes until the vegetables are fully tender.
Blend lightly if the soup benefits from body, or leave chunky for a brothier finish.
Adjust seasoning and serve hot as a complete light dinner.
meal_prep_notes: Soup keeps 3 days chilled and freezes well. Reheat gently to a simmer. If using leafy greens, add them fresh during reheating so the color stays clean.
